subject: A satyr riding atop the back of a stampeding bull, arm raised in triumph as a herd of bulls thunders forward
description: A bare-chested satyr with goat legs balances on the back of a charging white bull, one arm thrown up in exuberant celebration. The bull's horns are lowered and its hooves kick up dust as it leads a stampede of similar bulls churning beneath and around it. The art is rendered in a near-monochrome wash of deep reds and oranges, giving the scene the heat and chaos of a sun-baked rampage. Motion lines and dust clouds emphasize the forward thrust of the herd.
foreground: satyr rider on the back of a charging bull
background: stampeding herd of bulls in dust and haze
emotion: triumphant, reckless, ecstatic — arm raised in celebration mid-charge
